symptom_description: Purge unit running excessively (`> 45 minutes per hour` exhausting non-condensables). Tech noted significant oil film near rupture disc flange.
root_cause: Degraded elastomeric O-ring seal on condenser relief/rupture disc flange assembly allowing gradual low-pressure refrigerant seepage.
action_taken: Performed thorough leak search using heated diode detector, located leak at rupture disc flange, recovered charge, replaced rupture disc and O-ring gasket, evacuated to 300 microns, and re-trimmed R-134a charge.
parts_used: Centrifugal Compressor Shaft Seal Assembly, Oil Filter Element, R-134a (65 lbs)

symptom_description: High oil temperature alarm (`91`°C) and `sharp` drop in differential oil pressure across centrifugal compressor thrust bearing. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from TOWER-301.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of journal and thrust hydrodynamic babbitt bearings after 35,000 hours of high-speed centrifugal duty.
action_taken: Disassembled compressor drive end, installed new precision babbitt bearing set, calibrated oil pressure regulating valve, and performed full oil flush.
parts_used: Centrifugal Bearing Rebuild Kit (Journal & Thrust), Oil Sump Gasket Set, POE Oil Charge (8 Gal)

symptom_description: Ops noted chiller struggling to maintain `7°C` chilled water setpoint (`sharp` deficit) during afternoon peak load due to high head pressure.
root_cause: Bio-fouling and algae growth inside condenser tubes forming insulating biofilm layer after chemical biocide dosing pump failure.
action_taken: Performed full mechanical tube brushing of condenser and evaporator tube sheets, flushed bundles with clean water, and calibrated automatic water treatment controller.
parts_used: Water Box End Cover Gaskets, Nylon Replacement Tube Brushes (10-Pack)

symptom_description: Condenser approach temperature elevated to `95`°C (`normal < 1.5°C`). Chiller head pressure running `21` PSI above design. Unit overdrawing current when TOWER-301 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Heavy calcium carbonate mineral scale and biological slime deposition inside copper condenser tubes due to cooling tower water chemical treatment lapse.
action_taken: Removed condenser water heads, cleared heavy silt/debris from pass ribs, brushed tube bundle with nylon/copper brushes, and renewed end cover gaskets.
parts_used: Neoprene Head Gaskets (Set of 4), Heavy-Duty Tube Cleaning Brushes

symptom_description: Chiller low refrigerant charge warning alarm triggered. Condenser approach temperature `moderate` elevated (`> 4.5°C`). Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from TOWER-301.
root_cause: Thermal expansion cycles loosened flange bolts on compressor suction elbow connection O-ring groove.
action_taken: Performed thorough leak search using heated diode detector, located leak at rupture disc flange, recovered charge, replaced rupture disc and O-ring gasket, evacuated to 300 microns, and re-trimmed R-134a charge.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

parts_used: Suction Elbow O-Ring Kit, Rupture Disc Gasket, R-134a Refrigerant (100 lbs)

symptom_description: Chiller low refrigerant charge warning alarm triggered. Condenser approach temperature `drastic` elevated (`> 4.5°C`).
root_cause: Thermal expansion cycles loosened flange bolts on compressor suction elbow connection O-ring groove.
action_taken: Eddy current tested evaporator tube bundle, identified 2 leaking copper tubes, plugged tubes using brass tapered drive plugs, evacuated chiller shell, and restored virgin R-134a charge.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

symptom_description: Chiller low refrigerant charge warning alarm triggered. Condenser approach temperature `extreme` elevated (`> 4.5°C`).
root_cause: Degraded elastomeric O-ring seal on condenser relief/rupture disc flange assembly allowing gradual low-pressure refrigerant seepage.
action_taken: Eddy current tested evaporator tube bundle, identified 2 leaking copper tubes, plugged tubes using brass tapered drive plugs, evacuated chiller shell, and restored virgin R-134a charge.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

symptom_description: Chiller tripped on low evaporator pressure cutout during pull-down. Sight glass on liquid line shows continuous stream of bubbles.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole in evaporator copper tube sheet bundle caused by winter freeze-thaw or aggressive chilled water treatment.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly, renewed oil separation filters, evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)

symptom_description: Condenser approach temperature elevated to `111`°C (`normal < 1.5°C`). Chiller head pressure running `26` PSI above design. High load demand from driven equipment (TOWER-301) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Bio-fouling and algae growth inside condenser tubes forming insulating biofilm layer after chemical biocide dosing pump failure.
action_taken: Removed condenser water heads, cleared heavy silt/debris from pass ribs, brushed tube bundle with nylon/copper brushes, and renewed end cover gaskets.
parts_used: Water Box End Cover Gaskets, Nylon Replacement Tube Brushes (10-Pack)

symptom_description: High condenser pressure warning alarm active on panel. Compressor running at `100%` guide vane opening to satisfy chilled water loop. Also inspected TOWER-301 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Accumulation of mud, silt, and cooling tower scale debris blocking water flow across passes inside condenser water boxes.
action_taken: Performed full mechanical tube brushing of condenser and evaporator tube sheets, flushed bundles with clean water, and calibrated automatic water treatment controller.
parts_used: Inhibited Acid Descaling Chemical (20 Gallons), Neutralizer Powder, Head Gasket Set

symptom_description: Loud gradual high-pitched whining and hissing inside compressor housing during guide vane modulation.
root_cause: Loss of hydrodynamic oil film stability due to refrigerant dilution in oil sump during low-load surge operation.
action_taken: Replaced worn high-speed thrust bearing pad assembly, renewed internal oil filter element, and filled compressor with fresh POE oil.
parts_used: Precision Thrust Bearing Pad Kit, Internal Oil Filter Cartridge, Compressor Gasket Set, Synthetic POE Lube

symptom_description: Evaporator level sensor indicating low charge (`moderate` drop). Purge pump-out frequency increased `300%` over baseline. Issue first noticed after high-temperature trip occurred on TOWER-301.
root_cause: Thermal expansion cycles loosened flange bolts on compressor suction elbow connection O-ring groove.
action_taken: Replaced open-drive compressor mechanical shaft seal assembly, renewed oil separation filters, evacuated system, and verified zero leak rate.
parts_used: Carbon Steel Rupture Disc Assembly, Neoprene Flange O-Ring, R-134a Refrigerant (120 lbs)

symptom_description: Purge unit running excessively (`> 45 minutes per hour` exhausting non-condensables). Tech noted excessive oil film near rupture disc flange.
root_cause: Leaking shaft seal on open-drive centrifugal compressor assembly caused by drying out of seal face carbon during extended winter shutdown.
action_taken: Replaced degraded compressor suction elbow O-ring seal and rupture disc assembly, pulled 24-hour deep vacuum test, and charged unit with 120 lbs of R-134a.
parts_used: Brass Tapered Tube Plugs (4-Pack), Epoxy Sealer, R-134a Top-off Charge (85 lbs)
